valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Sat 13 Jun 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Sun 14 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low north of Faeroes 999 expected Scandinavia 1002 by 1800 Saturday. Low Trafalgar 1015 slow-moving with little change by same time. High FitzRoy 1029 dissipating
